method: Deterministic public-data audit. Clinical-term counts are explicit lexical mentions or structured-condition matches, not phenotype prevalence and not model accuracy.

nhse_synthetic_clinical_notes.role: Best of the four for longitudinal clinical-note/evidence-pipeline stress testing while waiting for MIMIC. Released Silver notes do not provide clinician phenotype gold, so these counts cannot establish C3 accuracy.

asclepius_synthetic_clinical_notes.role: Large-scale synthetic clinical-language/prompt robustness and general NLP task testing. Generated instruction-answer labels are not clinician RA-comorbidity phenotype gold.

pmc_patients.role: Best of the four for real biomedical-language domain-shift and open-ended disease extraction experiments. These are case-report patient summaries rather than EHR notes and have no matched structured ICD gold for C4.

synthea.role: Best of the four for structured-EHR/cohort/Gold-Text-Structured pipeline mechanics. The standard sample does not supply independently authored clinical free-text phenotype gold, so it cannot establish real under-recording recovery.

recommended_order: NHSE synthetic clinical notes for RA-note/evidence pipeline
Synthea for structured cohort and discordance mechanics
PMC-Patients for real biomedical-language domain-shift/open-ended discovery

provenance.note: The workflow's later failure was caused only by an optional SimSUM/Xet proxy assertion; all four requested dataset audits completed successfully.
